rulings.Case Title: CHRISTIAN DOEGL ET AL VS. SANDRALINE CEDERWALL ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 22, 2018 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT(S) ROBERT ELMAN and SYLVIA ELMANS' DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT sustained in part and moot in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend to allege facts in support of each element of causes of action for Breach of Fiduciary Duty/Constructive Fraud and Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress as to Elman with requisite specificity. Demurrer to cause of action for Elder Abuse is motion in view of the ruling on Motion to Strike. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHRISTIAN DOEGL ET AL VS. SANDRALINE CEDERWALL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 22, 2018 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT(S) ROBERT ELMAN and SYLVIA ELMANS' MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Cross-Complainant was granted leave to amend the cross-complaint to effectuate the changes outlined in Motion for Leave to Amend 5:11-20. Paragraphs 23 and 24 have been so identified; cause of action for Elder Abuse has not. Therefore, motion to strike is granted as to the cause of action for Elder Abuse improperly included in the Second Amended Cross-Complaint without leave of Court; and denied as to paragraphs 23 and 24. = (501/REQ)
